nodes.label: Graphify Knowledge Graph
nodes.rationale: Persistent knowledge graph at graphify-out/ with god nodes, community structure, and cross-file relationships; exists so codebase questions can be answered from a scoped subgraph instead of raw grep output or full-source browsing.

nodes.label: Graphify Query/Path/Explain Commands
nodes.rationale: Preferred first step for codebase questions because they return a scoped subgraph, usually much smaller than GRAPH_REPORT.md or raw grep output.

nodes.label: Graphify Wiki Index Navigation
nodes.rationale: graphify-out/wiki/index.md is used for broad navigation instead of raw source browsing when it exists.

nodes.label: GRAPH_REPORT.md Architecture Review
nodes.rationale: Read only for broad architecture review or when query/path/explain do not surface enough context, to avoid loading large context unnecessarily.

nodes.label: Graphify AST-Only Update
nodes.rationale: Run `graphify update .` after modifying code to keep the graph current; AST-only mode is chosen because it incurs no API cost.

nodes.label: CC0 License
nodes.rationale: Template released under CC0 so users are free to learn from it and incorporate it into their own projects.
